changes.rationale: Old gate connected to prod DB directly; never exercised the actual RO share path

changes.change: Harden MAP termination: line.strip()==']' -> re.match(r'^\s*\]\s*(#.*)?$', line)
changes.rationale: Trailing whitespace or inline comments after ] would prevent parser from terminating correctly

changes.change: Add _get_git_sha_full(); enrich _verify_prod_source() audit dict with git_sha, source_connection_type, ro_share_path, tables_validated
changes.rationale: Provenance artifact lacked reproducibility metadata needed for peer review

changes.change: Fix script 96 usage (remove --md); update gate list to reflect split gate names
changes.rationale: Script 96 uses --env not --md; incorrect docs would cause operator errors

changes.change: Fix Step 1.1 (remove --db unsupported flag); fix Step 2.5 (remove --md from script 96)
changes.rationale: Neither flag exists in the referenced scripts

manual_steps_remaining: None — RO share gate requires same token as old ro_share gate
ci_behaviour_changed: additive — prod promotion now checks 2 gates instead of 1 for share validation
